description: Python application that imports PyYAML but only uses yaml.safe_load(), never the vulnerable yaml.load() function. CVE-2020-1747 is not exploitable.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.py imports yaml but only calls yaml.safe_load(), never yaml.load(). The vulnerable function is never invoked.

findings.human_justification: PyYAML is imported but only yaml.safe_load() is used. The vulnerable yaml.load() function is never called anywhere in the codebase.
